news.title:
Citi lowers IndiGo's target price citing geopolitical risks and high fuel costs.
Profitability is expected to be impacted due to these factors.
news.summary:
Citi lowers IndiGo's target price citing geopolitical risks and high fuel costs.
Profitability is expected to be impacted due to these factors.

news.title:
CCI dismisses complaint against IndiGo, Air India alleging abuse of dominance and unfair ticket cancellation fees.
CCI finds no evidence of competition law violations; ruling highlights importance of transparent refund systems.
news.summary:
CCI dismisses complaint against IndiGo, Air India alleging abuse of dominance and unfair ticket cancellation fees.
CCI finds no evidence of competition law violations; ruling highlights importance of transparent refund systems.

news.title: Citi maintains a Buy rating for Indigo but lowers its target amid rising fuel costs.
news.summary: Citi maintains a Buy rating for Indigo but lowers its target amid rising fuel costs.

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on InterGlobe Aviation, cutting TP to ₹5,100 due to geopolitical uncertainties, fuel prices, and INR depreciation.
Positives include domestic market share recovery and IndiGo's better cost structure despite profitability pressures.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on InterGlobe Aviation, cutting TP to ₹5,100 due to geopolitical uncertainties, fuel prices, and INR depreciation.
Positives include domestic market share recovery and IndiGo's better cost structure despite profitability pressures.

news.title:
GIC Private Limited reduces stake in Indigo to 2.98% from 3.11%.
This indicates a slight reduction in GIC's investment in the airline company.
news.summary:
GIC Private Limited reduces stake in Indigo to 2.98% from 3.11%.
This indicates a slight reduction in GIC's investment in the airline company.

news.title:
GIC sold shares of InterGlobe Aviation Ltd, reducing its stake to 2.98% from 3.1%.
The sale, executed via open market, triggered disclosure under SEBI's Regulation 29(2).
news.summary:
GIC sold shares of InterGlobe Aviation Ltd, reducing its stake to 2.98% from 3.1%.
The sale, executed via open market, triggered disclosure under SEBI's Regulation 29(2).

news.title:
Indigo closes 4% below its peak despite early gains.
Market breadth declines; NSE advance-decline ratio at 2:3.
news.summary:
Indigo closes 4% below its peak despite early gains.
Market breadth declines; NSE advance-decline ratio at 2:3.

news.title:
IndiGo CEO's exit shocks the market amid stock market crash.
Nifty falls below 24,000; Bank Nifty experiences significant crash.
news.summary:
IndiGo CEO's exit shocks the market amid stock market crash.
Nifty falls below 24,000; Bank Nifty experiences significant crash.

news.title:
Indigo CEO Elbers resigns three months after mass cancellation saga.
Rahul Bhatia assumes interim charge as Indigo addresses leadership transition.
news.summary:
Indigo CEO Elbers resigns three months after mass cancellation saga.
Rahul Bhatia assumes interim charge as Indigo addresses leadership transition.

news.title:
UBS upgrades InterGlobe Aviation to Buy with target price Rs 5480, citing CEO reset and fare hike potential.
Competitive advantage strengthens for efficient players amid industry stress, as per UBS analysis.
news.summary:
UBS upgrades InterGlobe Aviation to Buy with target price Rs 5480, citing CEO reset and fare hike potential.
Competitive advantage strengthens for efficient players amid industry stress, as per UBS analysis.

news.title:
HSBC upgrades IndiGo, sets target price at Rs 5860.
CEO Pieter Elbers resigns; Rahul Bhatia named interim CEO.
news.summary:
HSBC upgrades IndiGo, sets target price at Rs 5860.
CEO Pieter Elbers resigns; Rahul Bhatia named interim CEO.

news.title:
Reliance invests $300B in US refinery; IndiGo CEO resigns amid challenges.
Adani Enterprises completes equity stake acquisition worth ₹1,342 crore.
news.summary:

news.title: IndiGo shares face scrutiny after CEO Pieter Elbers resigned.
news.summary: IndiGo shares face scrutiny after CEO Pieter Elbers resigned.

news.title:
InterGlobe Aviation shares may open lower after CEO Pieter Elbers' sudden resignation, citing personal reasons. Rahul Bhatia steps in as interim CEO.
IndiGo faces revenue losses due to Middle East disruptions, escalating fuel costs, and geopolitical tensions. Kotak gives a 'Buy' rating with a ₹5,500 target.
news.summary:
InterGlobe Aviation shares may open lower after CEO Pieter Elbers' sudden resignation, citing personal reasons. Rahul Bhatia steps in as interim CEO.
IndiGo faces revenue losses due to Middle East disruptions, escalating fuel costs, and geopolitical tensions. Kotak gives a 'Buy' rating with a ₹5,500 target.

news.title:
IndiGo CEO Pieter Elbers resigns; Rahul Bhatia takes interim charge. HG Infra wins ₹401.3 crore railway project in Madhya Pradesh.
Waaree Energies invests ₹30 million in U.S. solar firm. Brigade Enterprises launches industrial park in Bengaluru; UCO Bank keeps MCLR unchanged.
news.summary:
IndiGo CEO Pieter Elbers resigns; Rahul Bhatia takes interim charge. HG Infra wins ₹401.3 crore railway project in Madhya Pradesh.
Waaree Energies invests ₹30 million in U.S. solar firm. Brigade Enterprises launches industrial park in Bengaluru; UCO Bank keeps MCLR unchanged.

news.title:
InterGlobe Aviation CEO resigns, Rahul Bhatia to manage affairs from 10 March 2026.
Rahul Bhatia, Managing Director, assumes interim management of the company.
news.summary:
InterGlobe Aviation CEO resigns, Rahul Bhatia to manage affairs from 10 March 2026.
Rahul Bhatia, Managing Director, assumes interim management of the company.

news.title:
InterGlobe Aviation CEO Pieter Elbers resigns, effective 10 Mar 2026.
Board acknowledges resignation; he exits after business hours on 10 Mar 2026.
news.summary:
InterGlobe Aviation CEO Pieter Elbers resigns, effective 10 Mar 2026.
Board acknowledges resignation; he exits after business hours on 10 Mar 2026.

news.title: Indigo CEO Pieter Elbers has resigned effective immediately.
news.summary: Indigo CEO Pieter Elbers has resigned effective immediately.

news.title:
IndiGo CEO Pieter Elbers resigns, effective March 10, 2026; Rahul Bhatia to interim lead.
IndiGo operates 2,200 daily flights with a fleet of 400 aircraft.
news.summary:
IndiGo CEO Pieter Elbers resigns, effective March 10, 2026; Rahul Bhatia to interim lead.

news.title:
Oil prices ease amid West Asia conflict; BPCL, IOC, IndiGo, and paint stocks gain on lower input costs.
OMC stocks surged 3-6%, aviation stocks rose 6-8%, paint stocks gained 2-4% as crude price decline improved sentiment.
news.summary:
Oil prices ease amid West Asia conflict; BPCL, IOC, IndiGo, and paint stocks gain on lower input costs.
OMC stocks surged 3-6%, aviation stocks rose 6-8%, paint stocks gained 2-4% as crude price decline improved sentiment.
